metadata.description: Component reliability tracking for Neuron project. Updated as features are implemented and tested.
metadata.updateFrequency: After each component completes implementation or testing

NeuronAccessibilityService.description: Core L5 NERVE layer - executes accessibility actions

UITreeReader.description: L2 PERCEPTION layer - reads UI tree and generates screenshots

ActionExecutor.description: L5 NERVE layer - executes NeuronAction objects

SensitivityGate.description: L4 MEMORY layer - blocks sensitive actions (passwords, banking)
SensitivityGate.notes: Critical for privacy - requires extensive testing

LLMRouter.description: L3 BRAIN layer - routes between T1-T4 LLM tiers

PlanAndExecuteEngine.description: L3 BRAIN layer - plans multi-step actions and validates execution

MCP_Server.description: Protocol Bus - Python MCP server on localhost:7384

OverlayManager.description: L6 OUTPUT layer - renders overlay UI and handles TTS
